description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches pip files at $HOME/.cache/pip using a cache key of $CI_PROJECT_NAME, includes the gitlab.com/thelabnyc/thelab-ci-components/review, precommit, publish-gitlab-release, and publish-to-pypi components, and defines two stages: test and release. Add a test job named "test" in the test stage that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/thelabnyc/python:${IMAGE} and runs a parallel matrix for Python 3.11, 3.12, 3.13, and 3.14, each setting TOX_SKIP_ENV to skip the other versions; the job executes the shell commands "uv sync" then "uv run tox", captures coverage with the regex /^TOTAL.+?(\d+\%)$/ and only runs when the commit is on a protected branch or is a merge request event. The included components supply additional jobs in the release stage to publish a GitLab release and upload the package to PyPI.
